title: Predictive failure list for next 72 hours
difficulty_justification: Two-step plan: slurm.list_nodes to define the candidate set, then telemetry.query_timeseries to read the AIOps health-prediction series and rank nodes whose risk score exceeds the 72h threshold.
query_text: Which nodes does the predictive-failure model flag as at risk of hardware failure in the next 72 hours? Give me node IDs and confidence scores, ranked.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Three nodes are flagged: node047 (confidence 0.92, dominant feature: corrected memory errors), node112 (0.87, NIC retransmission rate), node023 (0.74, CPU temperature drift). All other nodes are below the 0.70 threshold.

checkpoints.description: telemetry.query_timeseries pulls the AIOps health-prediction series.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains telemetry.query_timeseries with metric_name implying aiops/health prediction

checkpoints.description: Final answer ranks the three correct nodes with confidence scores.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer lists node047, node112, node023 with confidence values within 0.05 of gold
